creator: christoph.mallon@gmx.de
text:
Please commit this update for the Jagged Alliance 2 port.

Summary of changes:
* Initial support for the mouse wheel.
* Enable scrolling using the mouse wheel for sliders, the message log in strategic screen and inventory list in personnel screen.
* Fix a vanilla bug: After losing the central SAM, the queen sends troops to recapture the SAM to the wrong sector.
* The button to end a turn in the single merc panel had accidently been linked to the mute button callback.
* Fix a bug which caused a crash when bloodcats were involved in battles.
* Fix a vanilla glitch which caused the colour used for APs to be different in single merc panel and team panel.
* Fixed various bugs, glitches and oddities.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
